prompt: Create a cinematic full-body autumn portrait of an androgynous adult with short dark curly hair standing centered on a leaf-covered park path, hands tucked into the pockets of a long camel-brown wool overcoat. The person wears a warm brown monochrome outfit: rust turtleneck sweater, high-waisted pleated trousers with a black belt, and dark brown leather ankle boots. Keep the face deliberately anonymous with a soft rectangular blur over the facial features while preserving the hair and silhouette. Surround the subject with glowing orange and golden fall foliage, large tree trunks on both sides, scattered leaves across the ground, and a softly blurred building in the distant background. Use warm golden-hour sunlight streaming through the trees, strong amber bokeh, shallow depth of field, natural lens compression, and a few large out-of-focus orange leaves in the foreground at the left and lower right edges. Compose as a vertical-feeling square image, subject centered and standing upright, elegant editorial fashion photography mood, rich autumn colors, realistic texture, no text, no watermark.
